lines.speaker: Toothy
lines.text: 's a sulphur mine. Ye get sulphur here. For making the dynamite, ye know? Folks use it in the blast mine. Watch the poison gas clouds, though - they'll choke ye.

lines.speaker: Toothy
lines.text: Grab yerself a pickaxe if ye wants to mine some sulphur. Make sure ye keeps yer mouth an' nose covered too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you got to trade?

lines.speaker: Toothy
lines.text: Pickaxes. For the mining. An' pots to make dynamite in.
